statements.sql: INSERT INTO silver.ExecVariableTarget (ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName) SELECT CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)), ProductName FROM bronze.Product
statements.rationale: Dynamic SQL is assembled through a variable assignment before EXEC, so the statement needs LLM-assisted reconstruction.

refactor.extracted_sql: SELECT CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)) AS ProductAlternateKey, ProductName AS EnglishProductName FROM bronze.Product
refactor.refactored_sql: WITH import_bronze_product AS ( SELECT ProductID, ProductName FROM bronze.Product ), logical_transformations AS ( SELECT CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)) AS ProductAlternateKey, ProductName AS EnglishProductName FROM import_bronze_product ), final AS ( SELECT ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName FROM logical_transformations ) SELECT * FROM final

source_tables.summary: Both queries use the same source table: bronze.Product

output_columns.summary: Both queries produce identical output columns: ProductAlternateKey (NVARCHAR(25)) and EnglishProductName (NVARCHAR(50))

joins.summary: No joins present in either query
